blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,132 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 55".
